title: Helsingborg, Skåne — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Helsingborg, Skåne: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Helsingborg is a city in Skåne with a population of 113,000. A coastal city at the narrowest point of the Øresund, with a historic fortress and ferry connections to Denmark.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
